title: Braun adds Indiana gas tax suspension on top of sales tax break
description:
Gov. Mike Braun not only extended the suspension of the sales tax on gasoline another 30 days Wednesday — he paused the state gas tax, as well.

title: Unemployment stays flat in delayed March report
description:
Indiana's unemployment rate stayed flat at 3.3% in March. The Indiana Department of Workforce Development said Wednesday that the state added 5,400 private sector jobs compared to the previous month.

title: Quarterly profit grows for Kimball Electronics
description:
The company said the results were driven by a more than 10% increase in sales from its medical division compared to the previous quarter.
